_comment: Manual guest corrections keyed by YouTube video_id. Entries here fully replace heuristic extraction for that video. Shape: { "<video_id>": { "guests": [{ "name": "Jane Doe", "linkedin_url": "...", "twitter_url": "...", "github_url": "...", "bluesky_url": "...", "website_url": "...", "bio": "..." }] } }. Names given only as first names in the source stay first-name-only rather than guessing.
